title: Gilbert K. Chesterton
content:
Unless I'm very much misled,
    Chesterton's easier done than said.
    I have not seen him, but his looks
    I can imagine from his books.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Oliver Herford, titled "Gilbert K. Chesterton", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
